function.name: answer
function.description: Design multiple locations in a movie, each with its own time, lighting, and image prompts for different acts.

locations.description: CRITICAL: This key MUST be named 'locations' (NOT 'scenes'). List of distinct locations or setups. Each location must contain location, time, lighting, and prompts fields.

location.description: The primary location or setting of the scene (e.g., 'abandoned warehouse', 'rainy city street').

lighting.description: Description of lighting conditions (e.g., 'harsh neon', 'soft candlelight', 'overcast diffuse').

prompts.description: Image generation prompts for different acts or moments within this location. Each prompt must have sex_act and prompt fields.

sex_act.description: select from one of these: sitting_cowgirl, lying_cowgirl,standing_missionary, lying_missionary,mating_press_missionary,  sitting_reverse_cowgirl, lying_reverse_cowgirl,kissing, standing_doggy, lean_forward_doggy, kneeling_doggy,lying_on_tummy_doggy,tongue_kissing, tougue_licking_oral_sex, sucking_oral_sex, deepthroat, standing_cunnilingus,squatting_cunnilingus, lying_cunnilingus .

prompt.description: Detailed text prompt for generating the image, be long.
